---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a functional error, UI regression, or offline resilience bug."
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

### 📝 Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the bug. Include the specific page or canvas component affected.

**Affected Portal / Component:**
- [ ] 🧑‍🎓 Student Canvas (`student.html`)
- [ ] 🧑‍🏫 Teacher Cockpit (`teacher.html`)
- [ ] 🏠 Home Portal (`index.html`)
- [ ] 📊 Interactive SVG Radar Charting
- [ ] 🤖 Socratic Chatbot Panel
- [ ] ⚡ Interactive Design Canvas (Drag & Drop)

---

### 📡 Offline & Connectivity State
- **Network State at Time of Bug:**
  - [ ] 🌐 Online (Standard internet connected)
  - [ ] 📴 Offline Mode Active (Toggled locally via UI)
  - [ ] 🔌 Hard Network Disconnected (Network throttle in DevTools)

---

### 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to `index.html` and navigate to the affected page.
2. Perform the following action: `...` (e.g., drag component X to drop-zone Y)
3. Observe the unexpected behavior: `...`

---

### 🎯 Expected Behavior
Describe exactly what should have happened if the platform was operating correctly.

---

### 📸 Visual Evidence & Logs
*If applicable, please paste screenshots or copy-paste browser Console/Network errors below:*

```text
(Paste red console logs or network stack errors here)
```

### 💻 Environment Details
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia]
- **Browser & Version:** [e.g., Chrome 124, Safari 17]
- **Viewport/Device Size:** [e.g., Laptop 1920x1080, iPad Portrait, Mobile 375x812]
